description: First-class forgetting primitive distinct from Sanction/revocation. Four-variant discriminated union over forget_scope. The crypto_full_destruction variant requires a legal_mandate_reference field; the other three variants must NOT carry the field (additionalProperties: false enforces). See docs/architecture/forget-record-semantics.md for the verifiability truth table.

anyOf.description: pii_only variant — PII redacted; identity shell + key + binding preserved. Past signatures still verify.

forget_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for this forget record (UUID v4).

subject_agent_id.description: The agent whose data is being forgotten.

authorized_by_signer_id.description: The signer that authorized this forget operation.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the forget operation was recorded.

contract_version.description: Hounfour contract version this forget record was authored against.

forget_scope.description: PII redacted; identity shell + key + binding preserved. Past signatures still verify.

anyOf.description: agent_full variant — identity tombstoned + PII destroyed; key material preserved on SignerEntry. Past signatures verify anonymously.

forget_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for this forget record (UUID v4).

subject_agent_id.description: The agent whose data is being forgotten.

authorized_by_signer_id.description: The signer that authorized this forget operation.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the forget operation was recorded.

contract_version.description: Hounfour contract version this forget record was authored against.

forget_scope.description: Identity tombstoned (hash-reference) + PII destroyed; key material preserved on SignerEntry. Past signatures verify anonymously.

anyOf.description: pii_and_link_to_key variant — PII destroyed + identity-key binding severed; anonymous public key preserved. GDPR-default scope.

forget_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for this forget record (UUID v4).

subject_agent_id.description: The agent whose data is being forgotten.

authorized_by_signer_id.description: The signer that authorized this forget operation.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the forget operation was recorded.

contract_version.description: Hounfour contract version this forget record was authored against.

forget_scope.description: PII destroyed + identity-key binding severed; anonymous public key preserved so past signatures still verify anonymously. GDPR-default scope.

anyOf.description: crypto_full_destruction variant — everything destroyed including key material. Breaks audit non-repudiation. Requires legal_mandate_reference (minLength: 8).

forget_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for this forget record (UUID v4).

subject_agent_id.description: The agent whose data is being forgotten.

authorized_by_signer_id.description: The signer that authorized this forget operation.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the forget operation was recorded.

contract_version.description: Hounfour contract version this forget record was authored against.

forget_scope.description: Everything including key material destroyed; BREAKS audit non-repudiation. Requires legal_mandate_reference.

legal_mandate_reference.description: Legal/regulatory mandate compelling key destruction (e.g., "GDPR-Article-17-Erasure-Order-2026-04-15"). Required ONLY for crypto_full_destruction scope; minLength 8 forces a non-trivial reference.
